title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description:
Key Responsibilities

Design & Planning

  • Contribute to Low-Level Design (LLD) activities related to Zscaler integration with Azure, Cisco SD-WAN, an distribution centres.
  • Validate Zscaler prerequisites and dependencies across Azure tenancy, SD-WAN vHeadends, and on-prem DC environments.
  • Support design of GRE/IPsec tunnels or cloud connector-based integrations between Azure SD-WAN infrastructure and Zscaler.
  • Participate in customer requirements workshops covering SD-WAN, cloud security, and internet breakout design.

Implementation & Configuration

  • Configure and validate Zscaler cloud connectivity for Azure-hosted SD-WAN vHeadends.
  • Support integration between Zscaler, Cisco SD-WAN controllers, and routing policies for internet-bound traffic.
  • Assist with policy alignment to ensure secure access to internet and cloud services post migration.
  • Support test environment builds and execute Zscaler-related implementation tasks during planned change windows.

Migration & Cutover Support

  • Provide Zscaler engineering support during DC migration events
  • Validate end-to-end connectivity post-migration, including:
  • Internet access via Zscaler
  • SD-WAN path selection
  • Cloud and Woolworths network reachability
  • Participate in structured weekend cutovers and next-business-day operational support following migrations.

Testing & Validation

  • Execute and support technical and business verification tests related to Zscaler traffic flows.
  • Troubleshoot routing, policy, or performance issues impacting Zscaler-integrated traffic.
  • Review and contribute to test artefacts, validation outputs, and operational handover documentation.

Documentation & Handover

  • Contribute to As-Built documentation covering Zscaler architecture and integrations.

Required Skills & Experience

Technical Skills

  • Strong hands-on experience with Zscaler Internet Access (ZIA) and cloud-based security architectures.
  • Experience integrating Zscaler with SD-WAN solutions, preferably Cisco SD-WAN.
  • Solid understanding of Azure networking, virtual appliances, and cloud connectivity patterns.
  • Experience with GRE/IPsec tunnels, routing, and internet breakout design.
  • Strong troubleshooting skills across routing, security policies, and cloud connectivity.

Project & Operational Skills

  • Experience supporting enterprise-scale migrations with change control and structured cutovers.
  • Ability to work from LLDs, run-sheets, and formal change documentation.
  • Comfortable working in multi-vendor environments (Cisco, Azure, Zscaler).
  • Strong communication skills to engage with network, cloud, and customer stakeholders.

YM Global is a Singapore based IT technology services and outsourcing company.
